title: Pre-review verdict
description: Codex output for a single PreToolUse review submission (file_change or bash_command). Strict-mode compatible: additionalProperties:false on every object, every property in required.

decision.description: Maps directly to PreToolUse permissionDecision. `allow`: the action is safe to run; `deny`: the action has a clear problem; `ask`: needs operator approval.

classification.description: What the reviewer judged the action to be. For bash_command: read_only (cannot change anything) or state_changing. For file_change kind: always file_change. Used by the worker for logging and by adopters reading the queue.

reason.description: Short, human-readable explanation. Surfaced to Claude as permissionDecisionReason.

findings.description: Per-issue detail when decision != allow. Empty array is valid (use it when the reason is self-contained).
